overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a forest path at night. The character travels from a dense wooded area with purple wildflowers past stone ruins and a wooden signpost, approaching a distant castle structure under a dark blue night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail with purple wildflowers

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the narrow forest path surrounded by dense trees and purple wildflowers

entered.detail: Tall dense trees forming a thick forest canopy on the left side of the path
Tall trees directly ahead forming a dense woodland backdrop
Tall dense trees on the right side creating an enclosed forest environment
Clusters of purple flowers growing alongside the left edge of the path
Patches of purple wildflowers visible on the right side of the trail
Narrow dirt trail winding through the forest undergrowth

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dense forest at night, with Geralt walking along a narrow dirt path. Tall trees surround the trail on both sides, creating an enclosed feeling with limited sky visibility. Purple wildflowers line the edges of the path, and the cool blue-green lighting suggests a clear night sky above the canopy.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest path with ancient stone ruins wall

events.description: ancient stone ruins wall comes into view on the right side of the path
distant castle structure becomes visible on the horizon ahead

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking as the path curves gently to the right, passing alongside the stone wall

entered.detail: Low stone wall made of stacked rocks, remnants of ancient ruins running alongside the path
Weathered wooden signpost with directional markers near the stone wall
Large stone castle or fortress ruins visible in the far distance against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The forest opens up slightly as the path curves right, revealing an ancient stone wall running alongside the trail. The dense tree cover on the right gives way to these ruins, and a wooden signpost appears near the wall. In the distance, the silhouette of a large castle structure becomes visible against the dark sky as Geralt continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: open rocky approach to castle ruins

events.description: path surface changes from dirt to rocky gravel terrain

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking toward the distant castle ruins, moving along the increasingly rocky path

entered.detail: Uneven rocky and gravel surface replacing the smooth dirt trail

segments.scene_description: The environment opens into a wider area with full sky visibility as Geralt approaches the castle. The stone wall and signpost fall behind, and the path becomes rocky and uneven. The distant castle structure remains the focal point ahead, growing slightly larger as the character advances through the sparsely vegetated terrain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense nocturnal forest that gradually opens into a wide, rocky approach toward a distant fortress. It begins on a narrow dirt path enclosed by tall trees and lined with purple wildflowers under cool blue-green lighting. As the path curves right, the dense canopy gives way to an ancient stone wall and a wooden signpost, while the silhouette of a large castle first emerges against the dark sky. The scene then expands into a wider area with full sky visibility as the ruins fall behind and the terrain becomes rocky and uneven. Finally, the camera advances through the sparsely vegetated landscape, keeping the growing castle structure as the central focal point.
